The '''''Ession Strike''''', originally named the '''''Night Caller''''', was a modified [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Night Caller'' carried four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] in its forward cargo hold and mounted a heavy [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projector in the place of one of its turbolaser turrets. Also, the normal deck between the hangar and bridge, usually used for luxury quarters, was removed.

These modifications were made during construction rather than as a refit, meaning that the ''Night Caller'' and the similarly modified ''[[Constrictor]]'' could be considered a sub-class of the CR90 corvette.

==History==
The ''Night Caller'' was captained by [[Zurel Darillian]] serving [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] before being captured by [[Wraith Squadron]] at [[Xobome]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. Wraith Squadron impersonated the ship's crew and carried out its itinerary, which included the placement of [[empion mine]]s along [[Hyperspace route/Legends|Hyperlanes]].

After Wraith Squadron captured the ship, the four TIE fighters were remounted at the escape pod supports, while both cargo bays were refitted to carry the squadron's X-wings. In addition to being able to launch, the fighters in the forward bay were able to act as static proton torpedo launchers, firing out through the forward cargo door opening. This move was called the [[Loran Spitball]].

The ''Night Caller'' was commanded in New Republic service by [[Choday Hrakness]] until his death at the [[Battle of Talasea]], at which point [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] [[Atril Tabanne]] took command.

Following the destruction of [[Apwar Trigit]]'s [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] at the [[Battle of Ession]], the corvette was renamed the '''''Ession Strike''''', and was assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Solo's]] [[Solo Fleet|fleet]] to destroy Zsinj's [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']].
